[string].description: Immutable sequence of UTF-16 characters, the most common value type in PowerShell

[int].description: 32-bit signed integer type used for counts and indices

[array].description: Fixed-size ordered collection of objects created with @() or comma operator

[hashtable].description: Key-value collection created with @{} syntax for parameter splatting and data storage

[PSCustomObject].description: Lightweight custom object with named properties created via [PSCustomObject]@{}

[datetime].description: Date and time value with methods for parsing, formatting, and arithmetic

[regex].description: Compiled regular expression for pattern matching and text replacement

[scriptblock].description: Block of script code that can be invoked with & or ., used for callbacks and delayed execution

$null.description: Automatic variable representing an empty or absent value
